289.issue_title: Epic: Installable Wheel / Standalone MCP Server (phase-gate-mcp)

402.issue_title: tooling: Expose JSON data in MCP tools

cycles.name: Cycle 1: Core Presenter & Infrastructure

deliverables.description: Base output schemas in tool_outputs.py and global presentation.yaml config
TextPresenter implementation and validate_presentation_alignment drift validator

cycles.exit_criteria: TextPresenter and startup validator pass all unit tests.

cycles.name: Cycle 2: Batch 1 (Admin, Health & Cycle Tools)

deliverables.description: Migration of HealthCheckTool, RestartServerTool, TransitionCycleTool, and ForceCycleTransitionTool

cycles.exit_criteria: All Batch 1 tools return Pydantic DTOs and compact text fallbacks, verified by assert_structured_tool_result.

cycles.name: Cycle 3: Batch 2 & 3 (Discovery & Git Tools)

deliverables.description: Migration of Discovery, Search, and Project tools (Batch 2)
Migration of Git Analysis and Mutation tools (Batch 3)

cycles.exit_criteria: All Git and Discovery tools return Pydantic DTOs, and git_status/git_restore/git_list_branches templates are fully compatible with string.Formatter.

cycles.name: Cycle 4: Batch 4 (GitHub Integration Tools)

deliverables.description: Migration of Issues, PRs, Labels, and Milestones tools (Batch 4)

cycles.exit_criteria: All GitHub tools successfully migrated and return flattened DTO presentation fields.

cycles.name: Cycle 5: Batch 5 (Phase, Scaffold, Quality & Testing Tools)

deliverables.description: Migration of Phase, Scaffold, Quality, Pytest, and Safe Edit tools (Batch 5)

cycles.exit_criteria: Batch 5 tools migrated; pytest tracebacks and safe edit diffs are only returned in the JSON payload, and JSON reference is appended conditionally.

cycles.name: Cycle 6: Validation, Quality Gates, and Cleanup

deliverables.description: Green full test suite run and clean quality gates check

cycles.exit_criteria: All 2880+ tests pass, and quality gates pass with zero lint or typing violations.
